attacking_style: Relies primarily on time trial power and sustained climbing rather than explosive attacks. Strongest in uphill TTs where climbing power combines with TT positioning; not an aggressive race animator.
team_tactics: Frequently lacks adequate mountain domestique support, particularly evident at Bora. When protected (UAE positioning noted), makes front selections but rarely sets own tempo or initiates moves.
terrain_preference: Uphill time trials are signature strength (Romandie demolition, Tour TT top-5 jump). Struggles on explosive climbs and when high-pace accelerations occur, especially early in long climbs.
vulnerability: Drops unexpectedly early when sustained high pace set by others (Knox/Evenepoel example). Susceptible to illness disrupting stage races. Lacks domestique support in crucial mountain moments.
key_patterns: Time trial strength consistently underestimated; major GC gains via TT efforts (2 observations)
Dropped before final 5km when others set sustained pace; lacks explosive response (3 observations)
Form/illness vulnerability disrupts stage race campaigns; abandoned Giro ill, nursed at Vuelta (2 observations)
Team support deficits in mountains while teammates succeed solo (Kämna); positioning issues (2 observations)
Off-pace on final climbs of one-day races despite favorite status (Lombardia weakness)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 showed concerning early-season weakness (dropped early Tour de Suisse, abandoned Giro ill) compared to stronger 2022 performances
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
